capabilityId.description: Unique identifier for the CFIP internal capability

system.description: System that owns the capability (internal to CFIP)

domain.description: Business domain of the CFIP capability

verb.description: CFIP capabilities are read-only by definition

object.description: Logical object produced or analyzed by the capability

endpoint.description: CFIP capabilities do not call external APIs

riskLevel.description: CFIP reconciliation capabilities are low risk by design

aiUsage.description: AI may reference CFIP capabilities for planning only

approvalRequired.description: CFIP read-only capabilities never require approval

constraints.description: Hard constraints governing CFIP capability behavior

outputContract.description: Fields produced by the CFIP capability

description: Schema defining internal CFIP capabilities used for cross-system reconciliation and analysis
